name: Sour-Cream Sugar Cakes
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Shortening (use half shortening and half butter combined)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the shortening: Use half shortening and half butter combined.
2. Cream together the shortening/butter mixture and sugar until smooth.
3. Add eggs one at a time, mixing thoroughly after each addition.
4. Alternately fold in the sour cream with the remaining dry ingredients.
5. Drop spoonfuls of batter onto greased and floured cookie sheets.
6. Sprinkle lightly with additional sugar.
7. Bake in a preheated moderate oven (350°F) for 10 minutes, or until golden brown.
